### RECENT DECISIONS

Cycle 0: Opening on the tonic A in deep shadow — a single thin line of moonlight catching still water, breathing slowly with the phrase. Nothing else.
  - addSVG({"svg_markup":"<svg viewBox=\"-500 -60 1000 120\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\"><defs><linearGradient id=\"ml\" x1=\"0\" x2=\"1\" y1=\"0\" y2=\"0\"><stop offset=\"0\" stop-color=\"#f5e6c8\" sto)
  - setBackground({"css_background":"radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 60%, rgba(74,102,112,0.18) 0%, rgba(20,16,14,0.96) 55%, #0c0908 100%)"})

Cycle 1: A small breath of testimony joining the moonlight — a single phrase, low and quiet, room enough around it.
  - addText({"content":"alone, and the room listening","position":"lower-left","style":"serif, light weight, medium","reactivity":[{"property":"opacity","feature":"hijaz_intensity","map":{"in":[0,1],"out":[0.55,0)

### FUTURE PREVIEW

Cycle 3 (t=20s): Moderate intensity, falling. Balanced timbre. Sparse articulation. Tonal center C# with secondary emphasis on A. Developing.
Cycle 4 (t=25s): Intense, falling. Bright timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center C# with secondary emphasis on A. Developing.
Cycle 5 (t=30s): Peak intensity, rising sharply. Bright timbre. Dense articulation. Tonal center C# with secondary emphasis on B. Developing.

### COMPOSITION INTENT FOR THIS CYCLE

Active act: opening — ground in shadow (Establish stillness on a near-tonic A. A single solitary anchor in deep shadow — moonlight as a thin line, or a head bowed. Leave generous space; the room is just beginning to listen.)
Cycle intent: Centroid begins to climb. A second anchor enters softly — a head bowed in shadow with soft side light.
Energy hint: rising

### TASK

Emit tool calls per `tools.json` (in the system prefix). Honor the
audited Bayati visual vocabulary. Do not output anything other than
the rationale text block followed by tool calls.
